text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Dober, I'm sorry, but could I ask you to take on
an assignment for me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sure, anything I can do to help.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Good. A package addressed to you is going to
arrive soon. I need you to make sure to get it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
They're German irises, and they've got frilly
petals that are quite lovely.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've heard from others that you're not particularly
fond of cute things, but I think you'll really like
these.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
They represent "burning desire" in the language
of flowers, and they're the birth flower for May.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll display them in my room!
